name_en: National Council of Resistance of Iran
description: The NCRI was co-founded by [Massoud Rajavi](/people/massoud-rajavi) and President [Abolhassan Banisadr](/people/abolhassan-banisadr) on 21 July 1981 as a broad coalition opposing the Islamic Republic. It functions as a parliament-in-exile comprising approximately 540 members, with the [Mojahedin-e Khalq](/orgs/mojahedin-e-khalq) as its principal member organization. [Maryam Rajavi](/people/maryam-rajavi) has served as its President-elect since 1993. Banisadr left the coalition in 1984 over disagreements with Rajavi's leadership. The NCRI is headquartered at Auvers-sur-Oise near Paris and advocates for the overthrow of the Islamic Republic and establishment of a secular democratic government.
editorial_notes: Banisadr left in 1984. NCRI claims support from thousands of parliamentarians worldwide.
